differential_diagnoses: Metastatic carcinoma (e.g., lung or occult primary) with bone marrow infiltration
next_steps: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
CT scan of the chest (high-resolution) to further evaluate pulmonary nodules
Serum soluble IL-2 receptor level and NK cell activity assay to investigate HLH
Repeat peripheral blood smear by a hematopathologist
Maintain supportive care including transfusions as clinically indicated
